    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BandsFileReader
    Provides functionality to read MusicBand objects from a file using a BufferedReader.
    BandsInputTerminal
    Provides interactive terminal input for creating MusicBand objects.
    ClassesManager
    Manages the collection of MusicBand objects, providing access and modification methods.
    Clear
     
    Colors
    Provides ANSI color codes for console output formatting.
    Command
    Abstract base class for all commands in the application.
    CommandsReader
    Handles reading and execution of commands from script files.
    Coordinates
    Represents the coordinates of a music band.
    CountByNumberOfParticipants
     
    DataCommands
    Manages the registration and execution of commands.
    DataInitializer
    Centralizes the initialization of all application components.
    ExecuteScript
     
    Exit
     
    FilterLessThanLabel
     
    Help
     
    IDGenerator
    Класс генерирует ID
    Info
     
    Insert
     
    JsonCleaner
    Provides functionality to clean a JSON file by truncating its content.
    JsonDataMapper
    Provides a configured Jackson ObjectMapper for JSON processing.
    JsonDateReader
    Provides functionality to retrieve the creation time of a JSON file.
    JsonParser
    Provides high-level JSON operations for reading and writing MusicBand collections.
    JsonReader
    Reads a JSON file and deserializes its content into a Hashtable of MusicBand objects keyed by Integer.
    JsonWriter
    Provides functionality to write JSON data to a file.
    KeyGenerator
    Класс генерирует ключи
    Label
     
    Main
     
    MusicBand
    Represents a music band entity with various attributes such as name, coordinates, creation date, number of participants, albums count, music genre, and label.
    MusicGenre
    Represents the music genre of a music band.
    PrintFieldDescendingLabel
     
    RemoveKey
     
    RemoveLower
     
    ReplaceIfGreater
     
    ReplaceIfLower
     
    Save
     
    Show
     
    Update
